---
title: "multivariate_wings"
---

Species level

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(brms)

d_gridded_sp <- d_gridded %>% group_by(species) %>% summarize(blackbrown = mean(sp_blackbrown),black_20=mean(hls_ch1_below0.2), flight_type = Mode(flight_type))


ggplot(d_gridded_sp, aes(x = blackbrown, y = black_20)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_log10() +  # log-transform x-axis
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue") +
  labs(x = "blackbrown (log scale)", y = "black_20") +
  theme_minimal()

# Formula for blackbrown (zero-inflated beta)
f1 <- bf(blackbrown ~ flight_type, family = zero_inflated_beta())

# Formula for black_20 (Gaussian)
f2 <- bf(black_20 ~ flight_type, family = gaussian())

# Fit multivariate model
m <- brm(
  f1 + f2 + set_rescor(FALSE),  # Set residual correlation if needed
  data = d_gridded_sp,
  chains = 3, cores = 3,
  iter = 3000, warmup = 1000
)


# Get fitted draws
fitted_vals <- fitted(m, summary = FALSE)

# Extract posterior draws for both responses
blackbrown_pred <- as.vector(fitted_vals[, , "blackbrown"])
black_20_pred <- as.vector(fitted_vals[, , "black20"])

# Combine into a data frame
draw_df <- data.frame(blackbrown = blackbrown_pred, black_20 = black_20_pred)

# Plot
ggplot(draw_df, aes(x = blackbrown, y = black_20)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior-predicted relationship",
    x = "blackbrown (predicted)",
    y = "black_20 (predicted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

Species sex level

```{r}

d_gridded_sp_sex <- d_gridded %>% group_by(species, sex) %>% summarize(blackbrown = mean(sp_blackbrown),black_20=mean(hls_ch1_below0.2), flight_type = Mode(flight_type))

d_gridded_sp_sex <- d_gridded %>%
  group_by(species, sex) %>%
  summarize(
    blackbrown = mean(c(sp_sex_blackbrown_fore, sp_sex_blackbrown_hind), na.rm = TRUE),
    black20 = mean(hls_ch1_below0.2, na.rm = TRUE),
    flight_type = Mode(flight_type),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

d_gridded_sp_sex <- dplyr::filter(d_gridded_sp_sex, sex != "unknown")

# Formula for blackbrown (zero-inflated beta)
f1 <- bf(blackbrown ~ flight_type * sex, family = zero_inflated_beta())

# Formula for black_20 (Gaussian)
f2 <- bf(black20 ~ flight_type * sex, family = gaussian())

# Fit multivariate model
m <- brm(
  f1 + f2 + set_rescor(FALSE),  # Set residual correlation if needed
  data = d_gridded_sp_sex,
  chains = 3, cores = 3,
  iter = 3000, warmup = 1000
)

plot_model(m)
```
